name: Atishay Kasliwal
title: Full Stack Engineer - Atishay Kasliwal
summary: Software Engineer with over 5 years of professional experience, currently pursuing a Master's in Data Science from Stony Brook University.

experience.description: Worked as a senior software engineer with focus on full-stack development
